hook.summary: A cat jumps on a desk, startling a man who falls back in his chair.
hook.visual_action: An orange cat jumps onto a computer desk and stares into the camera, causing a man to fall backward in surprise.

scene_flow: An orange cat jumps onto a desk, startling Austin the butler.
Austin falls backward in his chair as the camera zooms in on the cat.
A match-3 puzzle board appears, requiring the player to match button icons.
The player matches buttons to open a cardboard box, revealing a white kitten.
The ad ends with a level selection screen and a 'Play Now!' button.
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle players who enjoy pet-themed narratives and match-3 gameplay.
